revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Establishments-and-disestablishments-by-decade dual-purpose templates]] to [[:Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Speedy]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates| ]]

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates| ]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates| ]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates| ]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^(%d?%d?%d?0)s (d?i?s?establishments)$|%2|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD decade (e.g. "0s", "90s", "760s" or "1840s"}}}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates| ]] }}
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects (]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects (]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects (]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects (]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects (]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects (
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]]

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{Title decade}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates| ]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Establishments and disestablishments by decade dual-purpose templates
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{Title decade}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? establishments$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? disestablishments$|plain=false}} }}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{Title decade}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:qq]]

[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{Title decade}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:qq]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}|{{(Dis)establishments in decade category header/core|decade={{Title decade}}|bc={{#ifexpr: {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|BC|plain=false}} > 0|1}}|type={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d?%d?%d?0s ?B?C? (d?i?s?establishments)$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:(Dis)establishments in decade category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s establishments"}} or {{nowrap|"YYY0s disestablishments"}}, where YYY0s is an AD or BC decade (e.g. "0s", "90s BC", "760s" or "1840s BC"}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation|content=To make a category of the form "YYY0s establishments" or "YYY0s disestablishments", where YYY0s is a decade e.g. * [[:Category:0s establishments]] * [[:Category:90s establishments]] * [[:Category:760s establishments]] * [[:Category:1840s establishments]] * [[:Category:0s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:40s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:910s disestablishments]] * [[:Category:2010s disestablishments]] ==Usage== {{(Dis)establishments in decade category header}} No parameters needed == Redirects == * {{tl|Disestablishments in decade}} * {{tl|Establishments in decade}} == See also == * [[Template:(Dis)establishments in year category header]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
